name: Vasyl Latushko
review: Working alongside Rose is a consistently smooth and grounding experience — they genuinely embody the principle: 'slow is smooth, smooth is fast.' Rose picks up new technologies quickly as needed and applies them with strong fundamentals, which makes them reliable across shifting project demands. Rose will never stay silent when they spot contradictions in a feature design. Rather than dismissing an approach with a simple 'it won't work,' they take time to think it through and come back with a concrete perspective on how to resolve it — a habit that consistently improves the quality of what gets built. I'd recommend working with Rose without hesitation, and I'd jump at any chance to be on the same team again.

name: Matt Wehner
review: Rose is your friendly neighbourhood technical expert you'd regret not having on your team. When I got stuck on a difficult problem Rose was often the first person I'd shoulder tap to help me figure it out. Their ability to help identify the ACTUAL problem, simplify complex ideas down to actionable tasks, and communicate clearly at each step meant we wouldn't just solve the problem at hand but come away with a better solution and increased confidence going into the next one.

name: Lisa Szolovits
review: I loved working with Rose whenever we were paired up to work on features for Transfr's sim-building SDK. They were a skillful communicator: effortlessly distilling complex technical ideas, great at zeroing in on the problems to solve, and clearly laying out how to test their updates. From my perspective as a designer and sim developer using the SDK, I found Rose to be an empathetic collaborator, striving to deeply understand my challenges in using the tools and working determinedly to alleviate them. On top of all this, Rose is a positive presence on the team with their calm, friendly demeanor and welcome updates on their many interesting creative pursuits outside of work.

name: Ben Snowden
review: I worked with Rose at Transfr where they were a Senior Engineer on XR applications. During our time together they helped bring me up to speed on some of the platform's core systems and guided me through a refactor, and it was clear pretty quickly that they had a strong command of the codebase and the technology around it. They were patient, creative, and easy to work with. The kind of person who shares what they know without hesitation. Any team would be lucky to have them.

name: Elena Glazkova
tagline: Creative Technologist, Senior Technical Program Manager
review: I had the pleasure of working with Rose and can confidently say they are a fantastic teammate. Rose brings a thoughtful, proactive approach to problem-solving, often anticipating challenges early and coming up with creative, well-structured solutions. What really stands out is how Rose shows up for the team. They are not only reliable and easy to collaborate with, but also bring a sense of warmth and creativity into everyday work — whether it's small touches like sharing music to set the mood in standups or simply making the space feel more human and connected. Rose communicates clearly, supports their teammates, and helps create a positive, collaborative environment. Rose combines strong technical skills with emotional intelligence, which makes them an invaluable addition to any team.
